creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->repocopy

They don't disagree: 

I want to update lang/tolua to 5.1. Therefor I need to save tolua 
5.0 to lang/tolua50 so the ports which don't work with tolua 5.1 
and thus require tolua 5.0 are save. 

So the repocopy is from lang/tolua to lang/tolua50. 

(re-read: Yes, still makes sense)
